fa-mango.appearanceId: a rounded teardrop-shaped tropical fruit silhouette with a small stem at the top and a slightly flattened base; oval stone-fruit outline with a short curved stem nub
fa-mango.functionalityId: marks a mango item in a food or produce catalog; represents a tropical fruit in a grocery or recipe app
fa-mango.intentId: find or select mango as an ingredient or food item; browse tropical fruit options in a recipe or shopping list

fa-manhole.appearanceId: a circular or slightly oval utility cover shape with a hatched or grid pattern of raised lines across the surface; round street cover outline with a crosshatch or ribbed tread pattern
fa-manhole.functionalityId: marks an underground utility access point or maintenance entry; represents a sewer or infrastructure access hatch on a map
fa-manhole.intentId: identify an underground utility access point on a map; locate or report a manhole in a city infrastructure system

fa-map.appearanceId: a folded paper map shape showing two or three vertical fold panels with wavy or jagged lines suggesting roads and terrain; rectangular map sheet outline with visible fold creases and simplified geographic markings
fa-map.functionalityId: opens a map view or geographic navigation interface; displays a route or area map in an app
fa-map.intentId: navigate to a destination using a map; view geographic information or plan a route

fa-map-marked.appearanceId: a folded paper map with fold panel creases and a solid teardrop location pin shape overlaid on the surface; map sheet outline with a filled map marker pinned at a specific spot
fa-map-marked.functionalityId: marks a specific location on a folded map; pins a geographic point of interest on a map view
fa-map-marked.intentId: save or share a specific location on a map; mark a point of interest for navigation or reference

fa-map-marked-alt.appearanceId: a folded paper map with fold panel creases and a hollow or outlined teardrop location pin shape overlaid on the surface; map sheet outline with a stroked map marker at a specific position
fa-map-marked-alt.functionalityId: marks an alternate or secondary location on a folded map; pins an outlined location indicator on a map display
fa-map-marked-alt.intentId: indicate a secondary or alternate point of interest on a map; mark a location with a lighter or alternate style pin

fa-map-marker.appearanceId: a solid teardrop-shaped location pin with a circular head at the top and a pointed base tapering downward; filled drop-pin silhouette with a round bulb and sharp lower tip
fa-map-marker.functionalityId: marks a specific geographic location on a map; drops a location pin at a point of interest
fa-map-marker.intentId: identify or save a location on a map; drop a pin to mark a destination or point of interest

fa-map-marker-slash.appearanceId: a teardrop-shaped location pin silhouette with a diagonal slash line crossing through it; drop-pin outline with a cancellation stroke running from corner to corner
fa-map-marker-slash.functionalityId: removes or disables a location marker on a map; indicates a location pin is unavailable or turned off
fa-map-marker-slash.intentId: remove a saved map marker or location pin; disable location marking in a mapping application

fa-map-pin.appearanceId: a slender pin shape with a small circular or diamond head at the top and a thin pointed shaft tapering to a fine tip at the bottom; pushpin silhouette with a compact round head and elongated needle body
fa-map-pin.functionalityId: pins a location or item onto a map or board; marks a specific point with a thin pin indicator
fa-map-pin.intentId: mark a location or item with a pin on a map or pinboard; save a point of interest using a pin marker

fa-map-signs.appearanceId: two or more rectangular road sign shapes mounted on a vertical pole at different heights and pointing in different directions; directional signpost silhouette with multiple horizontal arrow-tipped plaques on a single post
fa-map-signs.functionalityId: indicates a directional signpost or wayfinding intersection; displays multiple route or destination options on a sign
fa-map-signs.intentId: navigate to one of several directions or destinations; find wayfinding information at a route intersection

fa-marker.appearanceId: a cylindrical felt-tip marker pen silhouette shown at a slight diagonal angle with a tapered or chisel tip at one end; tube-shaped marker outline with a pointed writing nib
fa-marker.functionalityId: activates a highlight or annotation marker tool; marks up or annotates content with a marker pen
fa-marker.intentId: annotate or highlight content using a marker tool; draw attention to specific text or areas in a document

fa-mars.appearanceId: a circle with a single straight arrow pointing diagonally upward and to the right from the upper edge; male gender symbol outline with a rightward-upward arrow extending from the circle
fa-mars.functionalityId: represents the male gender symbol in a form or profile; filters or labels content as male
fa-mars.intentId: indicate or select the male gender in a profile or filter; label content associated with male or masculine identity

fa-mars-and-venus.appearanceId: a circle with an upward-right arrow on one side merged with a circle with a cross hanging below on the other side; male and female gender symbols interlocked side by side sharing a combined form
fa-mars-and-venus.functionalityId: represents a male and female pairing or heterosexual gender combination; indicates mixed-gender content or a couples category
fa-mars-and-venus.intentId: indicate a male-female pairing or relationship; label mixed-gender or couples-oriented content

fa-mars-and-venus-burst.appearanceId: interlocked male and female gender symbols with radiating burst lines or spikes emanating outward around the combined form; merged mars-and-venus circle with explosive rays surrounding the pair
fa-mars-and-venus-burst.functionalityId: represents an intense or dynamic male-female interaction or relationship event; signals a significant gender-related event or alert
fa-mars-and-venus-burst.intentId: highlight a significant relationship event or gender interaction; indicate an urgent or high-impact gender-related situation

fa-mars-double.appearanceId: two side-by-side circles each with an upward-right diagonal arrow, sharing or overlapping their circle bodies; double male gender symbol with two rightward-upward arrows emerging from adjoined circles
fa-mars-double.functionalityId: represents a male-male pairing or same-sex male gender combination; indicates content or relationships involving two males
fa-mars-double.intentId: indicate a male-male relationship or same-sex male pairing; label content associated with two males or gay male identity

fa-mars-stroke.appearanceId: a circle with an upward-right diagonal arrow and an additional short horizontal or vertical stroke crossing the arrow shaft; male gender symbol with a secondary bar intersecting the arrow
fa-mars-stroke.functionalityId: represents a transgender male or non-binary gender variant symbol; indicates a modified or alternate male gender identity
fa-mars-stroke.intentId: indicate a transgender male or gender-variant identity; label content associated with modified male gender symbols

fa-mars-stroke-h.appearanceId: a circle with an upward-right arrow and a horizontal crossbar striking through the arrow shaft horizontally; male gender symbol with a perpendicular horizontal stroke intersecting the diagonal arrow
fa-mars-stroke-h.functionalityId: represents a horizontally stroked male gender variant symbol; indicates a specific non-binary or transgender gender identity variant
fa-mars-stroke-h.intentId: indicate a horizontally stroked gender variant identity; label content with a specific alternate male gender symbol

fa-mars-stroke-v.appearanceId: a circle with an upward-right arrow and a vertical stroke bisecting the arrow shaft downward; male gender symbol with a perpendicular vertical line crossing the diagonal arrow
fa-mars-stroke-v.functionalityId: represents a vertically stroked male gender variant symbol; indicates a specific non-binary or transgender gender identity variant
fa-mars-stroke-v.intentId: indicate a vertically stroked gender variant identity; label content with a specific alternate male gender symbol

fa-martini-glass.appearanceId: a wide inverted triangular bowl on a long slender stem with a flat circular base; cocktail glass silhouette with a v-shaped wide top and narrow stem and foot
fa-martini-glass.functionalityId: marks a cocktail, bar, or alcoholic beverage item in a menu or app; represents a drinks or nightlife category
fa-martini-glass.intentId: find cocktail options or bar-related content; browse drink menus or nightlife venues

fa-mask.appearanceId: an ornate theatrical mask shape with a curved oval face, dramatic eye openings, and decorative features suggesting a comedy or tragedy drama mask; stylized performance mask outline with elongated eye cutouts and theatrical flourishes
fa-mask.functionalityId: represents theater, performance art, or drama categories; marks content related to performing arts or masquerade
fa-mask.intentId: access theater or performing arts content; browse drama, masquerade, or performance-related topics

fa-mask-face.appearanceId: a flat rectangular or contoured cloth surgical or face-covering mask shape with ear loop straps on each side; fabric face mask outline with ear bands and horizontal pleated folds across the front
fa-mask-face.functionalityId: represents a face covering or surgical mask for health protection; indicates a mask-required or health safety guideline
fa-mask-face.intentId: indicate a face mask requirement or health safety measure; find or select face covering items in a health or safety context

fa-mask-snorkel.appearanceId: a diving or snorkel mask shape covering eyes and nose with a wide lens frame and a curved breathing tube or snorkel extending upward from one side; underwater goggles outline with a side-mounted curved air tube
fa-mask-snorkel.functionalityId: represents snorkeling or underwater diving equipment; marks a water sports or dive activity category
fa-mask-snorkel.intentId: find snorkeling or diving gear and activity options; browse underwater sports equipment or dive site listings

fa-mask-ventilator.appearanceId: a medical respiratory mask with a contoured face cup shape and a corrugated or ribbed tube extending from the front center; ventilator mask outline with a breathing circuit hose attached at the mouthpiece
fa-mask-ventilator.functionalityId: represents a medical ventilator or respiratory support device; indicates mechanical breathing assistance in a healthcare context
fa-mask-ventilator.intentId: manage or indicate ventilator or respiratory support equipment; access critical care or breathing assistance device information

fa-masks-theater.appearanceId: two overlapping or side-by-side theatrical masks with one showing a happy expression and the other a sad expression; comedy and tragedy mask pair silhouettes with contrasting curved mouth lines
fa-masks-theater.functionalityId: represents the performing arts, theater, or drama categories; marks content related to stage shows or theatrical productions
fa-masks-theater.intentId: find theater shows or performing arts events; browse drama or stage production content

fa-mattress-pillow.appearanceId: a flat rectangular mattress shape with a rounded rectangular pillow placed on top at one end; bed surface outline with a thick horizontal pad and a smaller cushion block resting on the upper portion
fa-mattress-pillow.functionalityId: represents a sleeping surface, bed, or rest area; marks a bedroom, accommodation, or sleep product category
fa-mattress-pillow.intentId: find mattress or bedding products; browse sleeping accommodation options or bedroom furnishing content

fa-maximize.appearanceId: a square or rectangle outline with four outward-pointing arrows at each corner indicating expansion; window frame shape with diagonal or axis-aligned expand arrows at all four corners
fa-maximize.functionalityId: expands a window, panel, or view to full screen; maximizes the size of a content area or modal
fa-maximize.intentId: enlarge a window or view to fill the available screen space; maximize a panel or media player for full-screen viewing

fa-meat.appearanceId: a bone-shaped piece of meat with a rounded flesh portion and a protruding bone end on one or both sides; ham or drumstick silhouette with a meaty oval body and a thin bone handle
fa-meat.functionalityId: marks a meat, protein, or carnivore food item in a recipe or menu app; represents a meat category in a grocery or nutrition context
fa-meat.intentId: find meat or protein food options in a recipe or shopping app; browse carnivore or meat-based menu items

fa-medal.appearanceId: a circular medallion shape hanging from a ribbon or bar at the top; round award disk outline suspended from a short horizontal band or ribbon drape
fa-medal.functionalityId: represents an achievement, award, or ranking badge; marks a leaderboard position or earned credential
fa-medal.intentId: display or award a medal for an achievement or competition; indicate a top ranking or earned accomplishment

fa-medkit.appearanceId: a rectangular box or case with a handle on top and a plus or cross symbol on the front face; first aid kit suitcase outline with a medical cross emblem on the lid
fa-medkit.functionalityId: represents a first aid kit or medical supply case; accesses health and emergency medical resources
fa-medkit.intentId: locate first aid supplies or emergency medical equipment; access health kit or medical resource information

fa-megaphone.appearanceId: a cone-shaped loudspeaker or bullhorn with a wide flared mouth opening and a narrow handle end; tapered megaphone silhouette with a wide bell on one end and a grip on the other
fa-megaphone.functionalityId: broadcasts an announcement or alert to a wide audience; amplifies a message or notification in a communication app
fa-megaphone.intentId: send a broadcast announcement or public alert; amplify a message to reach a large group or audience

fa-meh.appearanceId: a round face outline with two simple dot eyes and a flat or slightly downturned horizontal mouth line; circular face silhouette expressing a neutral or unimpressed expression
fa-meh.functionalityId: represents a neutral, indifferent, or unimpressed reaction; submits a mediocre or average user sentiment rating
fa-meh.intentId: express a neutral or indifferent reaction to content; submit an average or underwhelming satisfaction rating

fa-meh-blank.appearanceId: a round face outline with two simple dot eyes and no mouth line at all; circular face silhouette with eyes but a completely blank lower face area
fa-meh-blank.functionalityId: represents a blank, expressionless, or unresponsive reaction; indicates an empty or undefined emotional state
fa-meh-blank.intentId: express a completely neutral or blank emotional response; indicate an absence of reaction or undefined sentiment

fa-meh-rolling-eyes.appearanceId: a round face outline with two eyes containing upward-turned pupils as if rolling and a flat or slightly downturned mouth; circular face silhouette with eyes rolled upward in an exasperated expression
fa-meh-rolling-eyes.functionalityId: represents an eye-rolling or exasperated reaction; expresses annoyance or disbelief in a sentiment or emoji context
fa-meh-rolling-eyes.intentId: convey an eye-rolling or exasperated reaction to content; express annoyance or skeptical disbelief in a feedback system

fa-melon.appearanceId: a round or slightly oval whole fruit shape with a textured or smooth rind surface and a small stem at the top; spherical melon silhouette with a short curved stem nub and light surface line detail
fa-melon.functionalityId: marks a melon item in a fruit or produce catalog; represents a round fruit category in a grocery or recipe app
fa-melon.intentId: find or select melon as an ingredient or food item; browse round fruit options in a recipe or shopping list

fa-melon-slice.appearanceId: a wedge-shaped slice of melon with a curved rind edge on the outer arc, flat cut faces on the two straight sides, and small seed shapes along the inner flesh; triangular fruit wedge outline with a rind border and visible seeds
fa-melon-slice.functionalityId: marks a melon slice or cut fruit item in a food or menu app; represents a fresh fruit serving in a nutrition or recipe context
fa-melon-slice.intentId: select a melon slice as a food or recipe ingredient; browse fresh-cut fruit options in a menu or shopping app

fa-memo.appearanceId: a rectangular document or note shape with horizontal text lines across the surface; flat paper sheet outline with multiple parallel line strokes suggesting written content
fa-memo.functionalityId: creates or opens a text memo or note; represents a written document or note entry in a productivity app
fa-memo.intentId: write or view a short text memo or note; create or access a document note in a productivity or notes app

fa-memo-circle-check.appearanceId: a rectangular document or note shape with horizontal text lines and a small filled circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid at the corner; paper sheet outline with multiple line strokes and a verification badge
fa-memo-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a memo or document as reviewed and approved; confirms a note or task item has been completed
fa-memo-circle-check.intentId: confirm a memo or document has been reviewed or completed; mark a note as approved or verified in a task system

fa-memo-circle-info.appearanceId: a rectangular document or note shape with horizontal text lines and a small filled circle containing an information letter i badge overlaid at the corner; paper sheet outline with line strokes and an info badge
fa-memo-circle-info.functionalityId: attaches additional information or details to a memo or note; indicates that a document has supplementary info available
fa-memo-circle-info.intentId: view additional information linked to a memo or document; access supplementary details attached to a note

fa-memo-pad.appearanceId: a rectangular notepad shape with horizontal ruled lines and a bound top edge suggesting a spiral or pad binding; lined paper pad outline with a top margin strip indicating a pad or binding
fa-memo-pad.functionalityId: represents a physical or digital notepad for writing notes; opens a lined memo pad for quick text entry
fa-memo-pad.intentId: write or review notes on a memo pad; access a lined notepad for quick jottings in a productivity app

fa-memory.appearanceId: a long narrow rectangular RAM module or memory stick shape with small square chip bumps along the top edge; computer memory card outline with a row of rectangular chip contacts on the upper border
fa-memory.functionalityId: represents system RAM or computer memory hardware; indicates a memory or storage specification in a device context
fa-memory.intentId: check or manage computer memory or RAM specifications; view or upgrade system memory in a hardware or tech context

fa-menorah.appearanceId: a seven-branched candelabrum with a central vertical stem and three curved arms branching outward on each side each topped with a candle shape; traditional Jewish menorah silhouette with seven candle holders on curved branches
fa-menorah.functionalityId: represents the Jewish menorah or Hanukkah celebration; marks Judaic religious content or a holiday observance
fa-menorah.intentId: indicate a Jewish religious context or Hanukkah holiday event; access Judaic cultural or religious content

fa-mercury.appearanceId: a circle with a downward-hanging cross below and a small upward-curved horn or crescent arc at the top of the circle; combined male and female gender symbol with an additional arc crown on top representing the Mercury or non-binary glyph
fa-mercury.functionalityId: represents the Mercury or non-binary gender symbol in a profile or form; indicates a non-binary or intersex gender identity
fa-mercury.intentId: indicate a non-binary or intersex gender identity in a profile; label content associated with the Mercury gender symbol

fa-merge.appearanceId: two diagonal lines converging from the upper left and upper right downward into a single vertical line at the bottom; forking path or branch lines joining into one unified line below
fa-merge.functionalityId: merges two branches, streams, or data sets into one; combines separate paths or items into a unified result
fa-merge.intentId: combine two data branches or workflows into one; merge separate code branches or content streams

fa-message.appearanceId: a rounded rectangle speech bubble shape with a small triangular or curved callout tail pointing downward at the lower left corner; chat bubble outline with a pointed lower-left tail
fa-message.functionalityId: opens a text message or chat conversation; represents a messaging or communication function
fa-message.intentId: send or read a chat message or text; access a messaging or conversation interface

fa-message-arrow-down.appearanceId: a rounded rectangle speech bubble with a callout tail at the lower left and a downward-pointing arrow inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a downward arrow glyph in the message area
fa-message-arrow-down.functionalityId: downloads or scrolls down within a message thread; indicates an incoming or descending message action
fa-message-arrow-down.intentId: scroll down or download content within a message thread; receive or retrieve a message from a downward direction

fa-message-arrow-up.appearanceId: a rounded rectangle speech bubble with a callout tail at the lower left and an upward-pointing arrow inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with an upward arrow glyph in the message area
fa-message-arrow-up.functionalityId: uploads or scrolls up within a message thread; sends or escalates a message upward in a conversation
fa-message-arrow-up.intentId: scroll up or upload content within a message thread; send or escalate a message upward in a conversation flow

fa-message-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: a rounded rectangle speech bubble with a callout tail at the lower left and a diagonal arrow pointing upward and to the right inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with an upper-right diagonal arrow glyph in the message area
fa-message-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: shares or forwards a message to an external destination; sends a message to another app or contact via an outgoing action
fa-message-arrow-up-right.intentId: share or forward a message to an external app or contact; send a message outward to a different destination

fa-message-bot.appearanceId: a rounded rectangle speech bubble with a callout tail at the lower left and a small robot or mechanical face shape inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with a robot head glyph in the message area
fa-message-bot.functionalityId: indicates a message from a chatbot or automated assistant; opens an AI or bot-driven chat conversation
fa-message-bot.intentId: interact with a chatbot or automated messaging assistant; indicate that a message was generated by a bot or AI agent

fa-message-captions.appearanceId: a rounded rectangle speech bubble with a callout tail at the lower left and two or three short horizontal text lines inside the bubble body; chat bubble outline with caption or subtitle line strokes in the message area
fa-message-captions.functionalityId: displays captions or subtitles within a message or media player; indicates captioned or transcribed text content in a conversation
fa-message-captions.intentId: enable captions or subtitles in a message or media context; view transcribed or captioned content within a chat or video
